name: 天翔龍閃
description: 飞天御剑流奥义。选择全图任意一名敌人，瞬间冲至其身旁造成200%攻击力的真实伤害。若击杀目标，立即恢复2点行动点
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 99, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var targetPiece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === target.instanceId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!targetPiece) return { success: false, message: '目标不存在' }; var dirs = [{x:0,y:-1},{x:1,y:0},{x:0,y:1},{x:-1,y:0}]; for (var d = dirs.length - 1; d > 0; d--) { var j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (d + 1)); var tmp = dirs[d]; dirs[d] = dirs[j]; dirs[j] = tmp; } var landCell = null; for (var i = 0; i < dirs.length; i++) { var nx = targetPiece.x + dirs[i].x; var ny = targetPiece.y + dirs[i].y; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === nx && t.y === ny; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) continue; var blocked = battle.pieces.some(function(p) { return p.x === nx && p.y === ny && p.currentHp > 0 && p.instanceId !== caster.instanceId; }); if (!blocked) { landCell = { x: nx, y: ny }; break; } } if (landCell) { caster.x = landCell.x; caster.y = landCell.y; } var dmgResult = dealDamage(caster, targetPiece, Math.floor(caster.attack * 2.5), 'true', battle, 'kenshin-amakakeru'); var dmg = dmgResult.totalDamage !== undefined ? dmgResult.totalDamage : (dmgResult.damage || 0); var msg = caster.name + '天翔龍閃！极速斩向' + targetPiece.name + '，造成' + dmg + '点真实伤害'; if (targetPiece.currentHp <= 0) { var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); if (player) { player.actionPoints = (player.actionPoints || 0) + 2; } msg += '。击杀目标！恢复2点行动点'; } return { success: true, message: msg }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { var dmg = Math.floor(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier); return { description: '全图任意一名敌人，冲至身旁造成' + dmg + '（200%攻击力）点真实伤害，击杀恢复2行动点', expectedValues: { damage: dmg } }; }
